text: Standing here in this bright, modern corridor, gazing at the glowing blue light and the R+D mural inside, I feel both curious and slightly out of place. It is a stark, futuristic environment—somewhere ideas are born, but where the human element feels small compared to the innovation on display. The aura is almost clinical, yet filled with potential. I feel the quiet anticipation of entering a space dedicated to research and development, yet I wonder if my presence is anything more than that of an observer in a world built for progress.
